positive: A whimsical, stylized forest scene illustration. The main subject is a group of smiling forest creatures (deer, fox, owl) engaged in play, rendered in a simplified, modern silhouette style. The composition is highly centered, featuring layered foliage, mushrooms, and glowing fireflies, creating a sense of depth and enchantment. Use a limited, earthy color palette of deep teal, burnt orange, forest green, and cream. The overall mood is playful and harmonious. Style should mimic screen-printed linocut art: high contrast, clean edges, bold shapes, suitable for large-scale apparel printing. Full bleed, symmetrical balance, vector illustration quality. Flat lighting.
negative: photorealistic, grainy, noisy, blurry, smudge, watermark, text, letters, logos, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor quality, low detail, grayscale, monochrome, gradient, solid colors, --ar 1:1
